changes: Fixed ambiguity around 'duration' field name — model was using 'durations' (plural) causing Python KeyError crashes
Replaced pseudocode with complete, copy-pasteable Node.js script — eliminates language choice errors and field name confusion
Added explicit JSON input example showing exact field names and types (duration keys are strings)
Fixed buggy downtime overlap check in pseudocode — replaced with correct condition: t < w.end && t + duration > w.start
Added double-pass downtime check to handle cascading window overlaps
Specified Node.js (.js) instead of allowing Python — avoids JSON key mismatches and ensures consistent runtime
Simplified structure: removed repair heuristic and constraint-checking sections in favor of a correct-by-construction greedy algorithm
Added explicit checklist for model to follow
